name: Arroz Con Pollo
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds broiler fryer chicken, cut up
10 oz. frozen green peas, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken, skin sides up, in an ungreased rectangular baking dish, 13x9x2 inches.
2. Sprinkle with salt, paprika, and pepper.
3. Cook uncovered at 350°F for 30 minutes.
4. Heat broth to boiling. Remove chicken and drain fat from the dish.
5. Mix broth, rice, onion, garlic salt, oregano, turmeric, bay leaf, and peas in the baking dish.
6. Top with chicken; cover with aluminum foil.
7. Cook at 350°F until rice and thickest pieces of chicken are done and liquid is absorbed, about 30 minutes.
8. Garnish with pimento strips and olives.
